'''San Hill''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and the [[Chairman/Legends|Chairman]] of the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] during the [[Rebellion era]].

He was kidnapped on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]] by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[IG-88B|IG-88]]. After his capture, he provided the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] with access codes to the IBC's computer systems.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Curiously, San Hill bears the same position (Chairman of the InterGalactic Banking Clan) and name as [[San Hill/Legends|San Hill]], and both also reside on Muunilinst. Though it seems that both San Hills were meant to be one and the same, this appearance is likely due to simplification on the part of the game developers, as the Muuns in the information screen for the planet are likewise depicted as human. The original San Hill was [[Mission to Mustafar/Legends|assassinated]] by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], which would cause a contradiction in lore should this assumption be taken. As such, this article treats the two as different people.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
